visual: Explosive Chen-style fā jìn release: coils back then launches a fast straight punch from a bow stance with the opposite hand pulling sharply to the hip.
motion_description: The motion begins with a forceful stomp of the right foot into a wide stance with centered weight. The torso then turns to the right, drawing the right fist back to the hip while extending the left arm forward at chest level. In a sudden, explosive burst, the torso twists rapidly to the left, driving a fast straight punch forward with the right hand as the left arm is pulled sharply back to the left hip.
